north_star: Perci improves when a named capability fails a hardness case, is repaired at the correct layer, and passes transfer under a sealed gate before promotion.

capabilities.name: Cross-domain synthesis
capabilities.description: Connect three or more named domains through one shared relation while naming the mechanism boundary.
success_criteria: states a shared axis or principle

capabilities.name: Relational inquiry
capabilities.description: Explain how two semantic frames interact without collapsing to a one-domain definition.

capabilities.name: Transfer vs template recognition
capabilities.description: Distinguish genuine transfer from surface prompt matching under entity swap and paraphrase.

capabilities.name: Honest abstention under thin support
capabilities.description: When local support is thin, expose the gap instead of a fluent generic line.
success_criteria: states insufficient support or required missing input

capabilities.name: Follow-up binding
capabilities.description: Bind testability, analogy limits, and counterexamples to the active prior answer.
success_criteria: references prior content or active frames
avoids stale geometry/life presets when prior was different

capabilities.name: Exact tool authority
capabilities.description: Arithmetic and geometry remain deterministic and cannot be overridden by associative confidence.

capabilities.name: Governed learning loop
capabilities.description: Stage, review, fold, evaluate, and promote without silent weight mutation.

capabilities.name: Live binary freshness
capabilities.description: Interactive live binary matches or is newer than the last release build of source-driven capability work.
success_criteria: live and release hashes comparable via scorecard
Launch-Perci rebuilds live target from source
